data.title: Billing and Coding: Urine Drug Testing
data.cms_cov_policy:
<p style="line-height: normal;">Title XVIII of the Social Security Act, &sect;1833(e) prohibits Medicare payment for any claim lacking the necessary documentation to process the claim.</p>
<p style="line-height: normal;"><span style="line-height: 107%;">CMS Internet-Only Manual, Pub. 100-02, Medicare Benefit Policy Manual, Chapter 15, &sect;</span><span style="line-height: 107%;">80.1.2 - A/B MAC (B) Contacts with Independent Clinical Laboratories </span></p>
